combination denotes (infant) death, while the Sun so placed indicates disease, deformity, or
death.
91. DEATH. If at birth Mars is in the Ascendant, while Venus is in an Angle, Mars causes death,
when he resumes the same point in the next round in his transit.
92. If Jupiter is in a Trine, Ascendant Lord in the Ascendant and Mars in an Angle to one of them,
it can cause immediate death.
93-97. EXCEEDINGLY LONG LIFE. The native lives for 108 years, if the 8th House is not
occupied, while Ascendant is free from malefic residence and Jupiter is in an Angle. A span
of over 108 years is granted, if Jupiter and Venus are in an Angle, while there are no malefics
in Trines and the 8th. Predict 120 years of life, if Venus is in the Ascendant, Jupiter is in an
Angle other than the Ascendant and the 8th House is not occupied by malefics. Similar span
